creator: quinot@inf.enst.fr
text:
The MASTER_SITES listed in graphics/xfig/Makefile
	(MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB + ftp://www-epb.lbl.gov/xfig/libraries/)
	do not carry the archive for the current PORTVERSION,
	xfig.3.2.3c.full.tar.gz. They only have version 3.2.3b.

	The current archive is available from http://www.xfig.org/xfigdist/.

Fix: 

MASTER_SITES=http://www.xfig.org/xfigdist/
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/graphics/xfig && make fetch

	Expected behaviour: success to fetch the archive.
	Observed behaviour: file not present on any listed MASTER_SITE.
